servinfo.title: Fail-Safe Table
servinfo.ptxt: When any of the following DTCs is detected, ECM control enters the fail-safe mode as long as the failure condition associated with the DTC continues. The fail-safe mode is canceled when ECM detects normal condition.

entry.ptxt: “A” Camshaft Position Timing Over Advanced or System Performance
Mass or Volume Air Flow “A” Circuit Low
ECM controls actuators using MAF value calculated based on TP sensor signal.
Mass or Volume Air Flow “A” Circuit High
Intake Air Temperature Sensor 1 Circuit Low
ECM controls actuators assuming that intake air temperature is 20 °C (68 °F).
Intake Air Temperature Sensor 1 Circuit High
Engine Coolant Temperature Sensor 1 Circuit Range / Performance
ECM calculates ECT value from engine load.
Engine Coolant Temperature Sensor 1 Circuit Low
Engine Coolant Temperature Sensor 1 Circuit High
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch “A” Circuit Low

item.ptxt: ECM controls fuel cut at specified engine speed.
ECM stops VVT actuator control.

entry.ptxt: Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch “A” Circuit High
O2 Sensor Circuit No Activity Detected (Sensor 1)
O2 Sensor Circuit No Activity Detected (Sensor 2)

item.ptxt: ECM stops fuel injector No.1 control.
ECM stops A/F feedback (closed-loop) control.
ECM stops fuel injector No.2 control.
ECM stops A/F feedback (closed-loop) control.
ECM stops fuel injector No.3 control.
ECM stops A/F feedback (closed-loop) control.
ECM stops fuel injector No.4 control.
ECM stops A/F feedback (closed-loop) control.

entry.ptxt: Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch “B” Circuit Low

item.ptxt: ECM controls fuel cut at specified engine speed.
ECM stops VVT actuator control.

entry.ptxt: Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch “B” Circuit High

item.ptxt: ECM stops fuel injector No.1 control.
ECM stops A/F feedback (closed-loop) control.
ECM stops fuel injector No.2 control.
ECM stops A/F feedback (closed-loop) control.
ECM stops fuel injector No.3 control.
ECM stops A/F feedback (closed-loop) control.
ECM stops fuel injector No.4 control.
ECM stops A/F feedback (closed-loop) control.

entry.ptxt: ECM stops fuel injector No.1 control for catalyst damaging levels of misfire.
ECM stops fuel injector No.2 control for catalyst damaging levels of misfire.
ECM stops fuel injector No.3 control for catalyst damaging levels of misfire.
ECM stops fuel injector No.4 control for catalyst damaging levels of misfire.

item.ptxt: ECM limits engine speed to 2,000 rpm.
ECM stops VVT actuator control.
ECM stops VVT actuator control.
ECM inhibits restarting engine.

entry.ptxt: Evaporative Emission System Purge Control Valve Circuit
Evaporative Emission System Purge Control Valve Circuit Low
Evaporative Emission System Purge Control Valve Circuit High
ECM controls actuators assuming that vehicle speed is 0 km/h (0 mph).
For cruise control model, ECM stops cruise control.
ECM stops A/C compressor relay control.

item.ptxt: Throttle movement and fuel injection are limited.
ECM controls actuators assuming that system voltage is 13.5 V.

entry.ptxt: For cruise control model, ECM stops cruise control.
ECM selects the following fail-safes depending on malfunction part.

item.ptxt: Fail-safe A:
None
Fail-safe B:
ECM fixes throttle valve at default position (about 7°).
ECM controls fuel cut at specified engine speed.
Fail-safe C:
ECM inhibits restarting engine.

entry.ptxt: A/C Clutch Relay Control Circuit Low
A/C Clutch Relay Control Circuit High
For cruise control model, ECM stops cruise control.
Intake Manifold Tuning Valve Control Circuit / Open
Generator Current Sensor Circuit Range / Performance
“A” Camshaft Position Actuator Control Circuit Low
“A” Camshaft Position Actuator Control Circuit High
Throttle Actuator Control Motor Circuit / Open
ECM controls fuel cut at specified engine speed.
Throttle Actuator Control Motor Circuit Range / Performance
Throttle Actuator Control Throttle Body Range / Performance
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch “D” Circuit Low

item.ptxt: ECM limits throttle valve to specified range.
ECM fixes throttle valve at default value, if DTC P2127 or P2128 is detected at the same time.

entry.ptxt: Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch “D” Circuit High
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch “E” Circuit Low

item.ptxt: ECM limits throttle valve to specified range.
ECM fixes throttle valve at default value, if DTC P2122 or P2123 is detected at the same time.

entry.ptxt: Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch “E” Circuit High
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch “A” / “B” Voltage Correlation

item.ptxt: ECM controls fuel cut at specified engine speed.
ECM stops VVT actuator control.

entry.ptxt: Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch “D” / “E” Voltage Correlation
ECM limits throttle valve to specified range.
Throttle Actuator Control System - Idle Position Not Learned
ECM controls fuel cut at specified engine speed.
ECM calculates BARO value from TP sensor signal.
O2 Sensor Signal Biased / Stuck Lean (Sensor 2)
O2 Sensor Signal Biased / Stuck Rich (Sensor 2)
Ignition Coil “A” Primary Control Circuit Low
Ignition Coil “A” Primary Control Circuit High
Ignition Coil “B” Primary Control Circuit Low
Ignition Coil “B” Primary Control Circuit High
Ignition Coil “C” Primary Control Circuit Low
Ignition Coil “C” Primary Control Circuit High
Ignition Coil “D” Primary Control Circuit Low
Ignition Coil “D” Primary Control Circuit High
Lost Communication With ESP® Control Module
ECM disables torque request from ESP® control module.
Lost Communication With Power Steering Control Module
Lost Communication With Body Control Module
Lost Communication With Keyless Start Control Module
Lost Communication With Instrument Panel Cluster (IPC) Control Module
